text: Davis-Bacon wage decisions are established by the DOL for various types of construction (e.g.,  residential,  heavy,  highway)  and  apply  to  specific  geographic  areas,  usually  a county or group of counties.  Wage decisions are modified from time to time to keep them current. In most cases, when the contract is awarded or when construction begins, the wage decision is 'locked-in' and no future modifications are applicable to the contract or project involved.
